---
title: "Bilingualism"
---

| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Bilingualism ↗</span> | Costa & Sebastián-Gallés (2014) | Antoniou (2019) |


::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::

<!-- Mentimeter 

beliefs: Does bilingualism affect the brain?


-->
